memory.summary: My friends are inviting me to Echo tonight, but I still have significant review work left for my midterm tomorrow.
I just declined Mina's invitation, confirming I will prioritize my midterm review tonight despite the social pressure.
I prioritized my midterm review over the club invitation, completing a significant portion of the work before the window to socialize closed.
I am glad I prioritized studying earlier, as my progress is now high and the social window has closed.
Joining the club social now that my midterm work is done feels like a rewarding way to balance my priorities.
I finished most of the midterm study before the deadline passed, so I can now relax while the exam begins.
With the midterm study fully complete at 10:15, I have cleared my academic obligations and can now focus entirely on rest or social activities without guilt.
